title: Raft - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by minting and dumping on a stablecoin protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls mint() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Over-valued collateral used to mint large amounts of stablecoin
monitoring_rules: BLOCK mint() if preceded by FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to over-value collateral and minted a large amount of stablecoin, which was then dumped. A guard could have blocked the minting transaction if it followed a flash loan in the same transaction.
